violations.text: The floor and wall junctures in the kitchen in certain areas do not have coving. The floor and wall junctures must be coved and closed to no larger than 1/32nd of an inch. Repeat Violation. Correct By: 04/15/2026

Gravy, which was prepared in advance, was not cooled to 70 degrees Fahrenheit in 2 hours and then to 41 degrees Fahrenheit within 4 hours. Per PIC, gravy was in walk-in since yesterday. Gravy was observed at 45 degrees. Product was disposed of. Corrected On-Site. New Violation. Correct By: 03/26/2026
Onion soup was observed with a day or date that exceeded 7 days. PIC disposed of product. Corrected On-Site. New Violation. Correct By: 03/26/2026

Proper cooling methods were not used for time/temperature control for safety (TCS) foods. Pasta was placed hot in the walk-in refrigerator in covered containers that were stacked on top of each other. Product was relocated to rapidly cool. Proper cooling methods reviewed with PIC. Corrected On-Site. New Violation. Correct By: 03/26/2026
The facility is lacking test strips to measure the concentration of the quaternary ammonium sanitizing solution for the 3-bay/sani buckets. New Violation. Correct By: 03/26/2026
The non-food contact surfaces of the shelving in the walk-in have an accumulation of dust, food residue, and other debris. New Violation. Correct By: 03/26/2026
Behind the cookline equipment has an accumulation grease and food debris. The physical facilities shall be cleaned as often as necessary to keep them clean. New Violation. Correct By: 03/26/2026

The floor and wall junctures in certain spots in the kitchen do not have coving. The floor and wall junctures must be coved and closed to no larger than 1/32nd of an inch. New Violation. Correct By: 04/30/2026
The establishment does not employ a full-time, on-site manager certified in food safety certified with RIDOH. Application provided. Repeat Violation. Correct By: 01/23/2025

The sink and surface concentration in the sanitizing solution of the 3-bay sink was 0 parts per million (ppm). According to the manufacturer's use directions, the concentration of the quaternary ammonium must be between 704-1875 ppm. Establishment stated they will switch to nu-foam tablets or bleach until dispenser is fixed. PIC to demonstrate to staff how to properly set up 3-bay sink. New Violation. Correct By: 01/23/2025

The pre-flush spray hose at the 3-bay is hanging below the flood rim. A plumbing system shall be installed to prevent backflow of a liquid or gas contaminant into the water supply by providing an air gap or installing an approved backflow prevention device. PIC stated shorter hose or an arm holding hose higher will be installed tomorrow. Repeat Violation. Correct By: 01/23/2025
The grout in the kitchen area is in poor repair. The physical facilities must be maintained in good repair. Repeat Violation. Correct By: 02/23/2025
The establishment does not employ a full-time, on-site manager certified with RIDOH. Application printed. New Violation. Correct By: 01/08/2025

Food contact surfaces of equipment/utensils (can opener and potato cutter) were observed with an accumulation of food and debris. The food contact surfaces of equipment must be clean to sight and touch. PIC removed both the can opener and potato cutter in placed them in 3-bay sink. Corrected On-Site. New Violation. Correct By: 01/08/2025

Varies sauces labeled keep refrigerated was observed above 41 degrees Fahrenheit. Time/temperature control for safety (TCS) food must be held at 41 degrees Fahrenheit or below except during preparation, cooking, or cooling. PIC voluntary disposed of sauces. Corrected On-Site. New Violation. Correct By: 01/08/2025
Meat Loaf was observed not marked with a date that exceeded 7 days during time of inspection. PIC voluntary disposed of Meat Loaf. Corrected On-Site. New Violation. Correct By: 01/08/2025
Sink and surface cleaner was observed above 1875 ppm during time of inspection. Proper ppm sanitizer setup during time of inspection. Corrected On-Site. New Violation. Correct By: 01/08/2025

The door to the outside, located in the back of establishment, is not tight-fitting. Outer openings of a food establishment must be protected against the entry of insects and rodents by tight-fitting doors. New Violation. Correct By: 01/08/2025
The non-food contact surfaces of the waffle maker has an accumulation of grease and misc. debris. New Violation. Correct By: 01/08/2025

The pre-flush spray hose at the dish machine is hanging below the flood rim. A plumbing system shall be installed to prevent backflow of a liquid or gas contaminant into the water supply by providing an air gap or installing an approved backflow prevention device. New Violation. Correct By: 01/08/2025

The floor in the kitchen area is in poor repair. The grout was observed worn down. The physical facilities must be maintained in good repair. Grout shall be repaired. New Violation. Correct By: 02/08/2025

Food contact surfaces of equipment/utensils (ice machine) were observed with an accumulation of biofilm. The food contact surfaces of equipment must be clean to sight and touch. Ice was voluntarily disposed of (see attached disposal form). Establishment must clean ice machine. Establishment purchased bagged ice. Corrected On-Site. New Violation. Correct By: 11/01/2023
